title: Ground Truth Edge
description: Schema for one line of graphify-out/ground_truth.jsonl. A manually curated reference edge with a known label and provenance metadata.

source_node_id.description: Stable node id of the edge source. Matches the id field in graph.json nodes.

target_node_id.description: Stable node id of the edge target.

relation.description: Relation type. Must match the closed enum used in inferred_clean.jsonl.

label.description: Ground truth binary label. 1 = positive (the edge exists and should be ranked high), 0 = negative control (edge is implausible; if ranked high it should drop F1).

kind.description: Provenance bucket. override = ADR-0004 contract edge from config/memory_overrides.json. cross_file_top = cross-file edge in the top-N from recall_test. background_T3 = Tier-3 background edge sampled for stratification. negative_control = sampled as plausibly-correct but not validated; expected F1 drop if ranked high. cross_submodule_positive = positive edge across distinct submodule_source / submodule_target, added in session 2026-06-23.

locality.description: Whether source and target live in the same submodule (intra) or different ones (cross). Optional but recommended for new entries.

recall_score.description: Recall score from validation run. Required when label=1 EXCEPT for kind=override (historical: overrides come from config/memory_overrides.json without a recall_score).

reason.description: Free-text rationale. Required when kind != 'override' and kind != 'cross_file_top' (i.e. for background_T3, negative_control, and the new cross_submodule_positive).

rationale.description: Optional human-readable rationale for why this edge is positive (mainly for cross_submodule_positive).

source_path.description: Optional provenance: source file path (relative to workspace).

submodule_source.description: Optional provenance: submodule name of source (e.g. atom-federation-os, asurdev, astrofin-sentinel-v5).

submodule_target.description: Optional provenance: submodule name of target.

allOf.description: recall_score required when label=1 except for override rows
reason required for negative_control and background_T3
